target: gs001:row:1 page 27 NIST running header fragments
exercise: Deterministic local application of nist-running-header-merge-001 ledger rule to representative page 27 extracted elements.
proves: The representative issue #4 extracted-JSON shape is repaired: same-band running_header fragments merge into one header_footer_noise page_chrome element.
The current real NIST page 27 snapshot routes the top header to header_footer_noise and preserves actual:p27:table:0.
The touched Python regression file passes ruff.
does_not_prove: Full GS001 PDF extraction quality across all pages.
That reportlab should remain an undeclared import dependency.
